title: "Attempt to extract pound of flesh": Madhya Pradesh HC rejects woman’s plea for interim maintenance from husband
description: The Madhya Pradesh High Court recently criticised a woman's plea for interim maintenance from her husband, after noting that she earned well enough to financially support herself. Justice Vivek Jain cited Shakespeare's Merchant of Venice, likening the woman's plea to an "attempt to extract a pound of flesh" from her estranged husband, to describe the unreasonable nature of the demand.“The present petition is nothing but an attempt to extract a pound of flesh from the husband, which cannot be per
